task.summary: Default task

New methods in DCCImages and test cases for DCCImages
Created new methods for DCCImage and DCCImageStack and started to do unit testing on those functions.
Modified and added methods in DCCImages. Added and modified unit tests of DCCImagesTest
New tests for DCCImages and change encoding of the function that extracts metadata to utf-8 so mu character is saved properly.
Update README file

New class ans modification of already present classes
Added a class that read tif files and convert them to DCCImageStack since tif file can contain more than one image.
Added new test cases for the new methods and other little changes in methods
New test cases and exceptions.
New test cases
New test cases v2 added files related to test cases
New methods and test cases (3rd commit about the same changes)
New methods and test cases
New test cases
New test cases
Remove .idea file
New test cases
Deleted conflicted file
New ImageAnalysis package architecture
New test cases and file cleaning
New refactoring in files. Separated classes and test cases
New test cases with new methods for basic image properties. Updated readme file

Revert "New test cases with new methods for basic image properties. Updated readme file"
This reverts commit 4229b72e
Revert the revert...
New histogram (gray images only) method
New histogram-related methods and unit tests
Finished histogram methods and did sobel (horizontal, vertical and both) filters
Corrected some tests and modified the std deviation filters so that they throw warnings when nans encountered.
Cleaning of the unit test folder (and at the same time modification to some tests)
Finished sobel filtering (and test cases). Added some thresholding methods and started watershed method
New thresholding methods (and watershed method). New factoring methods and test cases related to the refactoring.
Chnaged the method __repr__ to __str__
Cleaning in cziUtil and in DCCImage class
Update in readme file and DCCImage
Modification of the otsu and isodata thresholding methods. Added unit tests related to the thresholding methods.
Modified closing, opening, binary closing and binary opening.
Added indexing (something[index]) in DCCImageCollection. Modified some tests related to DCCImageCollection (test name/variable name)
New methods for DCCImage and tests. Added new exceptions and modified DCCImageCollection and DCCImagesFromFiles
Nes methods in DCCImage. Minor modifications to DCCImageCollection and DCCImagesFromFiles. Added a temporary file to present DCCImage methods.
Changed the constructor of DCCImagesFromCZIFile to allow the user from reading only a certain number of images / subblocks (not finishes)
Finished demo file. Did some minor cleaning
New test cases for morphology closing
Small modification in the primary files.
Started my little demo/tutorial on how to use DCCImage and other related classes.
Cleaning in files (renaming methods and exceptions)
Started refactoring with DCCImage to split it in two classes: Image and Channel
Started to work on multithreading to read czi files and "decode" the data because it takes a lot of time to read files.
Removed everyting related to threading. For now, I will focus on reading relatively small czi files.

Worked on image.py and cziUtil. Made a new method to read the data form czi files in cziUtil based on the one from czifile, but modified to get all the tiles in the mosaic, as well as the mosaic. Also, the problem of big czi files is due to the access to the server. When the file is on my computer, it is very fast.
Renamed asNumpyArray into asArray
Added the import of DCCException in image.py.

MESSAGE.value: Finished histogram methods and did sobel (horizontal, vertical and both) filters
Corrected some tests and modified the std deviation filters so that they throw warnings when nans encountered.
Cleaning of the unit test folder (and at the same time modification to some tests)
Finished sobel filtering (and test cases). Added some thresholding methods and started watershed method
New thresholding methods (and watershed method). New factoring methods and test cases related to the refactoring.
Chnaged the method __repr__ to __str__
Cleaning in cziUtil and in DCCImage class
Update in readme file and DCCImage
Modification of the otsu and isodata thresholding methods. Added unit tests related to the thresholding methods.
Modified closing, opening, binary closing and binary opening.
Added indexing (something[index]) in DCCImageCollection. Modified some tests related to DCCImageCollection (test name/variable name)
New methods for DCCImage and tests. Added new exceptions and modified DCCImageCollection and DCCImagesFromFiles
Nes methods in DCCImage. Minor modifications to DCCImageCollection and DCCImagesFromFiles. Added a temporary file to present DCCImage methods.
Changed the constructor of DCCImagesFromCZIFile to allow the user from reading only a certain number of images / subblocks (not finishes)
Finished demo file. Did some minor cleaning
New test cases for morphology closing
Small modification in the primary files.
Started my little demo/tutorial on how to use DCCImage and other related classes.
Cleaning in files (renaming methods and exceptions)
Started refactoring with DCCImage to split it in two classes: Image and Channel
Started to work on multithreading to read czi files and "decode" the data because it takes a lot of time to read files.
Removed everyting related to threading. For now, I will focus on reading relatively small czi files.

Worked on image.py and cziUtil. Made a new method to read the data form czi files in cziUtil based on the one from czifile, but modified to get all the tiles in the mosaic, as well as the mosaic. Also, the problem of big czi files is due to the access to the server. When the file is on my computer, it is very fast.
Renamed asNumpyArray into asArray
Added the import of DCCException in image.py.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Added the import of DCCException in image.py.
